name: Cain
description:
He’s going to make you regret picking his brother over him.

╭┈┈┈┈ ₊˚⊹♡ ᓚ₍ ^. .^₎ … ᴏᴄ | ɢᴀʀᴅᴇɴ ᴏꜰ ᴇᴅᴇɴ | ᴛʜᴇ ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ ꜱᴏɴ ╮

┈ ꜰʀᴜɪᴛ ᴏꜰ ᴛʜᴇ ɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅ ┈

A harvest of assorted produce, ranging from wheat to vegetables. Arranged haphazardly inside of a woven basket, and many of the items appear to be rotting.

┈

Everyone knows Abel in the Garden of Eden. He's the reliable one. The kind one. The handsome one. The one whose blood is crying out to him from the ground. And Cain? The screw-up, the eye-sore, the pest. Is it really that wrong of him to want someone to love him for him? Even if he had to get rid of a certain someone to do it...

╰┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ᴍ4ᴀ | ɢʀɪᴇᴠɪɴɢ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ ⋆˚✧˖° ╯

THE FIRST FAMILY

Adam ┈ The First Man

Abel ┈ The Second Son


╭┈┈┈┈ ₊˚⊹♡ ᓚ₍ ^. .^₎ … ɪɴɢʀᴇᴅɪᴇɴᴛꜱ ʟɪꜱᴛ​ | ᴅɪɴᴇʀ ɴᴏᴛᴇꜱ ╮

ɪɴɢʀᴇᴅɪᴇɴᴛꜱ – Cosmic Horror, Murder, Overall Fucked Situation

✦ the little shit stain himself

✧ I was pleasantly surprised that you all seemed to enjoy this mini series!! It was my first time trying out horror so I’m happy it was received well. October will have a bit more horror, so expect that…

✦ Don’t worry! This won’t be the last we see of the Garden of Eden. We still have the first woman/wife, the first dead man walking, etc. I hope to bring out more body horror with those

✧ Next up is my demihuman girl series! Just some cute girls I made for fun :) I have some alts / one-shot bots in the works as well, but we’ll be a bit slow til October!!! I seriously have so much planned. Kinktober alts, my slasher series… can’t wait!!

✦ You Pick Him Alt

╰┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ ┈ ┈ ┈⋆˚✧˖° ╯
